body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35345", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "A vulnerability in the tail utility of uutils coreutils allows for the exfiltration of sensitive file contents when using the --follow=name option. Unlike GNU tail, the uutils implementation continues to monitor a path after it has been replaced by a symbolic link, subsequently outputting the contents of the link's target. In environments where a privileged user (e.g., root) monitors a log directory, a local attacker with write access to that directory can replace a log file with a symlink to a sensitive system file (such as /etc/shadow), causing tail to disclose the contents of the sensitive file.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00096, "percentile": 0.00885}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xf75-659h-cgg5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T22:58:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xf75-659h-cgg5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xf75-659h-cgg5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35345"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:44Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35345", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10328", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xf75-659h-cgg5"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Link Following Issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T22:58:55Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xf75-659h-cgg5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
